titleStmt.title: SII 7.361: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 361. (A.R. No. 163 of 1901). ON THE NINTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhyē mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayādbhudaya śakavaruśa 1385 neya svabhā
nusaṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu[ddha A] Ā śrīnmaṁmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū
¨rvva paścima dakṣiṇa samudrādhipati śrīvīramallikā¨rjjunarāyana vi
jayarājyādbhudayadalu rāyara nirūpadiṁ śrīnmaṁmahāpradhā
na lakhaṇavoḍeyaru bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalu bārakūra
maṇikāṟakē¨ryyavoḷagaṇa sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalu nā
lvattanāḍavoḷagaṇa koregeyahuṭṭina kōṭiyaka seṭṭitiya magaṁ
kēsanamakiya tirumaseṭi māḍidaṁthā rudrapūje yibbaru brā(ṁ)
hmariṁge varuṣaṁprati 1 kkaṁ vōtadahāne voraveyakki nāghaṁḍugadalu A
kki mu 20 Akṣaradalu yippattu muḍe Akkiyanu mula dhārāpū¨rvakavā
gi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavaṁtāgi tāU biṭṭa bra(ṁ)hmadāyada
mulada bāḷu vi nana baḷiyavarakayyali huṭigekoṁḍa bāḷa sa[¨rvva]
svada catussīmeya vivara muḍalu naḍava dāriyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu bōgāṟa ttaṁmaṇasyeṭiya manyada bāḷu hodamaṁṇa
ḍe gaḍivōṇiyiṁda makkiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu kaṭṭuṁgareyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu beṭṭina baḷiya
vara mula muṟukē¨ryya halara dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bāḷu bayalu hosagadde 1
māvinagadde 1 hedegadde 1 Āntu gade 3 bittuva bede nāghaṁḍu
gadallā mu 18 mekke bittuva mu 4 maki bittuva mu 20 Āṁ
tu bayalu meka maki bituva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍu
gadalu mu 42 yi nālvatteraḍu mūḍe bittuva bāḷa mēle yibaru
brā(ṁ)hmaṇaru vuṁbadakke makki naḍava Akki mu 20 Akṣaradalu
yippattu muḍe Akkiyanu kālakālakke naḍasibaharu yi bāḷu
sa¨rvasvada mēle Araśa Anusariya[¨rmma]tte kādukoṭu dha¨r(ṁ)mava
naḍasikoṁbaru . yiṁtappudakke ka¨rttana voppa haḍavaḷa beṁ
mādhavana voppa yeḍahāḍiya bhaṭṭara voppa . dānapāla
nayō¨rmadhyē dānātsēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rgamavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.361 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
